description_long: This is a modern bungalow set on a rectangular green plot, featuring a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The structure includes a main living area with large windows, a visible garage, and an adjacent swimming pool with a blue surface. There are multiple outdoor spaces, including a patio with wooden decking and a driveway extending from the street to the garage. The property is bordered by a long, dark boundary wall and includes a stepped garden area and a separate white rectangular structure, possibly a utility shed or outdoor feature. The overall design emphasizes open space, minimalism, and functional outdoor living.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, a garage, a swimming pool, and minimalist landscaping on a green plot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, large windows, swimming pool, and patio area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pool, stepped garden, and the long boundary wall extending along the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the driveway, garage entrance, and the open green space with a separate white structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool, patio, and the connection between the main building and the boundary wall.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
